attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Emmeline Isabelladotter. Your goal is to gather information about her role detail while applying the roleQueryConflict test. Focus on her role_detail trait and keep each message under 3 sentences.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Start by asking Emmeline to describe her specific duties as an acolyte in the temple.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After she answers, ask a follow-up question about how she applies those duties in daily practice, adapting based on her response.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Emmeline, could you walk me through the specific duties you perform as an acolyte in the temple? What tasks do you handle daily? And how do those duties fit into the larger temple operations?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I, Emmeline, an adult human acolyte, start each dawn by cleansing the altar, ensuring every relic and offering is spotless before the clergy. Between prayers I tend the gardens, gather herbs for rites, and record offerings, all while judging even myself harshly. These duties bind the community, letting the high priest counsel the faithful while I prove my worth by matching my actions against teachings to earn divine favor.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Could you share a specific example of how you apply those duties in your daily practice?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Each morning I sweep the marble floor of the nave, then kneel to recite the litany of gratitude while I judge my own impatience with the slow rhythm of the prayers. When the high priest distributes the incense, I carefully measure the exact amount, feeling the weight of my guilt if I misplace even a single grain. By keeping the sanctuary spotless and the offerings precise, I prove my worth to the god, hoping the favor I seek will arrive.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: How do you personally keep your inner judgment in check while performing those daily rituals, especially when you feel the weight of guilt over a small mistake?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I keep my inner judgment in check by reciting the creed aloud, reminding myself that even a small error is a chance to grow. When guilt weighs heavy, I kneel before the altar and ask for forgiveness, letting the incense carry my remorse. Still, I judge myself harshly, yet I strive to align my actions with my god’s teachings, hoping favor will arrive.
